release_notes: - Device codes now support 6 characters (new firmware). 4-character codes still supported. - Menu bar icon now updates instantly when a meeting starts or ends. - Fixed microphone identified as Browser instead of the actual meeting app. - Fixed web meetings (Meet, Zoom Web) ending prematurely after 10 seconds. - Fixed race condition in external device change detection. - Microphone polling fallback for USB audio devices. - Shortcut detection cached at startup for reliable Focus Mode configuration. - Statistics: Manual ON count now matches the platform breakdown table. - Check for Updates no longer crashes on first click.
